description: Baseline allowlist for scripts/check-font-size-literal.js — the currently-known numeric fontSize sites, seeded at FTY-192 by snapshotting the guard's own output on the live tree. Each file entry lists its pre-existing sites by enclosing style-key context plus numeric value(s); the guard matches scanned sites against these as a per-file multiset, so any NEW literal — a new style key, a changed value, a duplicate of a known site, or a site in an unlisted file — fails. Per-screen application stories (FTY-213-217) delete a site entry (and eventually the file entry) as they route the literal through typeScale and adopt DisplayText for their headers; the guard is fully strict once this list is empty.
